key_drivers: Real yields falling to 1.87% (down from 1.92% on March 13, -5bps) = primary bullish driver for gold, tech, and risk assets
MOVE index falling -6.5% today (85.25) = rate vol easing, bullish for NQ and duration-sensitive assets
SOX rising +1.96% today (7,796) = semiconductor strength confirming tech/NQ bullish bias
RBA hiked rates to 4.10% today (March 17) + BoJ hawkish hold = bullish for AUD and JPY vs USD
Gold ETF inflows confirmed: WGC February $5.3B (9th consecutive month), holdings at historic high 4,171 tonnes
China Caixin PMI at 52.1 (5-year high) + industrial output +6.3% = accelerating growth, bullish for 6A and commodities
VIX 23.40 (risk-off, falling -0.47%) = elevated but declining, providing relief rally conditions

HY OAS: ycharts confirmed ~3.17% today (FRED BAMLH0A0HYM2 last showed 3.28% on March 13)
